description: Filter EnzymeMiner results by date, kingdom, and transmembrane status.
functions: Filter EnzymeMiner Excel output by 'First seen' cutoff date.

inputs.name: inputExcelFile
inputs.descr: EnzymeMiner results workbook — sheet 2 is read.

inputs.name: cutoffDate
inputs.descr: Only rows first seen before this date are kept (default: pre-Nagoya).
